expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Manage workspace membership: invite, change roles, revoke, and audit",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add membership audit log schema",
      "description": "As an admin, I want membership changes recorded so actions are auditable.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add audit table with actor, action, target, timestamp",
        "Existing membership records untouched",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/",
        "src/models/membership.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Invite member by email",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to invite a member by email so they can join workspace.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Send invite email with token",
        "Accept invite links create account/membership",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/services/inviteService.ts",
        "src/routes/invite.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Change member role",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to change a member's role between viewer, editor, admin so permissions update.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Role change API updates membership record",
        "Permissions reflect new role",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/services/roleService.ts",
        "src/routes/members.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Revoke workspace access",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to revoke a member's access so they can no longer access workspace data.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Revoke removes membership and invalidates sessions/tokens",
        "Audit log records revoke",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/services/membershipService.ts",
        "src/routes/members.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Review recent membership changes in settings page",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to review recent membership changes so I can monitor activity.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Settings page lists recent audit entries",
        "Pagination or recent N entries visible",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/pages/WorkspaceSettings.tsx",
        "src/components/AuditList.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
